--- SOURCE: https://www.po.co/global/product/poco-m7/ ---
Poco M7 - Xiaomi Global POCO M7 Overview Specs Massive 7000mAh (typ) battery Massive 7000mAh (typ) battery 33W fast and 18W reverse charging Immersive 6.9” FHD+ display 144Hz AdaptiveSync refresh rate Powerful Snapdragon® 685 Up to 16GB RAM with memory extension Clear 50MP AI dual camera Quad-curved design for in-hand comfort Excellent power efficiency Massive 7000mAh battery POCO's largest smartphone battery ever for global markets to date*, delivering an ultra-long battery life experience like never before. With a massive 7000mAh (typ) battery, it's perfect for extended video playback, reading and calling. *In relation to the range of POCO products as of 08/14/2025. 2.32 days* of use *Data obtained from the light daily use model of POCO Internal Labs. Actual results may vary. Up to 28 hours* Video playback Up to 46 hours* Calling Up to 29 hours* Reading *Data tested by POCO Internal Labs. Actual results may vary. 1% power, less anxiety Even with just 1% battery left, you can still make calls without worry. Up to 64 minutes* Calling Up to 10 hours* Standby *Data tested by POCO Internal Labs. Actual results may vary. Low-temperature resistance Equipped with a BatteryExtender Chip, battery performance remains strong even in low temperatures. -20℃ battery performance* *Data tested by POCO Internal Labs. Actual results may vary. Up to 14 hours* Video playback Up to 35 hours* Music playback Up to 7 hours* Calling Engineered to last Even after 1,600 charge cycles, POCO M7's battery can maintain 80% or more of its original capacity.* *Data tested by POCO Internal Labs. Actual results may vary. 33W turbo charging* Supports 33W turbo charging for improved charging efficiency, allowing you to stay powered up anytime. *No power adapter included in the box. It is recommended to use with a Xiaomi 33W power adapter. 18W reverse charging* Enough power for itself and others, POCO M7 can double as a portable power bank, the perfect companion for long days. 10 minutes* Reverse charging time Up to 50 minutes of video playback* POCO M7 Pro Over 1 hour of calling* POCO X7 Up to 12.5 hours of standby time* POCO Pad *Refers to the usage supported by each device after 10 minutes of wired reverse charging from POCO M7. Data tested by POCO Internal Labs. Actual results may vary. Smart Charging Engine 2.0 Zero Power Instant On When your battery runs out, the system intelligently springs back to life within 4 seconds of charging.* Battery Health 4.0 Low-battery fast charging Smart battery protection *Data tested by POCO Internal Labs. Actual results may vary. Large cinematic screen 6.9-inch large screen experience Featuring a spacious display and FHD+ clarity, it offers vibrant colors and a wide viewing angle, delivering an immersive experience for videos and gaming. 9-level adaptive refresh rate The screen intelligently adapts to different scenarios, providing a smooth and responsive visual experience for improved viewing comfort. 144Hz* Refresh rate *Refresh rate can be adjusted to up to 144Hz for supported apps. Multiple eye-care certifications The screen is specially designed to safeguard eye health and minimise eye irritation, enhance comfort during extended use and in low-light conditions. DC dimming TÜV Rheinland Low Blue Light (Software Solution) Certified TÜV Rheinland Flicker Free Certified TÜV Rheinland Circadian Friendly Certified Wet touch technology 2.0 Even when your fingers are wet or covered with oil or foam, POCO M7 responds accurately to every touch, ensuring a smooth operating experience. Superior smooth experience Powerful Snapdragon® 685 Processor Built on an efficient 6nm process, POCO M7 delivers stable performance with improved efficiency and lower power consumption. Seamlessly Extendable Memory Supports up to 16GB* with memory extension for heavier multitasking and smoother task switching.
